title: Te with caron
summary: Te with caron (Т̌ т̌; italics: Т̌ т̌) is a letter of the Cyrillic script. It is used in the Shughni and Wakhi languages for the /θ/ sound, like the ⟨th⟩ in 'thing'. It was also used in three Chuvash alphabets published around the turn of the 20th century to represent /tʲ/.
text: Te with caron (Т̌ т̌; italics: Т̌ т̌) is a letter of the Cyrillic script. It is used in the Shughni and Wakhi languages for the /θ/ sound, like the ⟨th⟩ in 'thing'. It was also used in three Chuvash alphabets published around the turn of the 20th century to represent /tʲ/.
